		Dataset Summary
	

OmniaBench is a broad, diagnostic benchmark for evaluating general AI agents. Scenario knowledge is
distilled from app stores, product documents, industry resources, and web retrieval… See the full description on the dataset page: https://huggingface.co/datasets/scuuy666/OmniaBench.
